productDisplayName: Puma Men Edition Navy Blue T-shirt
description: CompositionBlue round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, that has a softly ribbed neckline and graphic print with flock detailing on the frontFitRegularWash careGentle machine wash with like colours in cool waterDo not bleachTumble dry at low temperatureWarm ironDo not dry cleanLook cool this summer in this blue t-shirt from puma. The bold graphic on the chest with the illustration of the stadium and the words "Trick Shot Specialist" adds a dose of vibrant energy to the tee. Team this with jeans and canvas shoes for a casual look.This tee is a product of puma Vision and the Cotton made in Africa tab is a symbol of fair trade practice where the purchase of this product leads to a valuable contribution to the living and working conditions of African farmers and their families.
